$comment: Targets for the 24/7 agent fleet (kaanha-agents plugin). repos[] is auto-filled from the dev-hub registry on every scan - you never hand-edit it. Add sites[] entries for URL-based squads (site-sentinel, flow-tester, design-warden) that need routes/flows. reports[] is set to your ops home on first run. Replace the <...> placeholders in market when you want the growth squads on-target.

cloud_models.$comment: Optional: provider/model per Wave-2 cloud reasoning squad, used only when you run the squads as GitHub Actions. Local squads run in the Claude app and ignore this. Add the matching API-key secret per repo: GEMINI_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY / XAI_API_KEY.
